title: EBM + Random Forest + Logistic/Ridge Baselines on 8 Real Datasets
summary: Demonstrates EBM, Random Forest, and Logistic/Ridge Regression baselines on the credit dataset (binary classification) from the Grinsztajn benchmark. Uses 80 curated examples with pre-assigned 5-fold CV splits. Trains each model per fold, computes balanced accuracy, AUC, fit time, and EBM interpretability metrics (n_terms, interactions, main effects). Visualizes aggregate results with bar charts comparing methods.
